Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences

Test and Services Catalogue

MENU

The aim of Istanbul Okan University, Faculty of Engineering and Natural Sciences laboratories is to provide a scientific research and testing facility with modern test and analysis devices for researchers working in our university, public institutions and industry. In addition to research capabilities, our laboratories aim to meet the test and measurement requests of private and public institutions during product development, testing and production stages. Institutions and organisations wishing to receive testing and analysis services can contact researchers working in related fields, laboratories or ARPROGED.
